message: ci: replace deprecated pnpm setup action

files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,11 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
-      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
+        with:
+          node-version: 20
+          cache: pnpm
+      - run: corepack enable
       - run: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
       - run: pnpm --version
       - run: pnpm check
